title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
